data.title: ARPA brings its verifiable random number generator to CARV and Sonic SVM
data.description:
ARPA Network, a threshold signature scheme (TSS) platform, is bringing its verifiable random number generator, Randcast, to CARV and Sonic SVM, as per the reports shared with Finbold on Friday, April 18. The integration is part of ARPA’s ongoing strategic expansions and efforts to address fairness issues associated with randomness within blockchain. Web3 randomness Randomness is one of the foundations of decentralized ecosystems, as it often determines how fair, transparent, and secure the experience is. However, traditional random number generator (RNG) systems can be manipulated or centralized, which defeats their purpose
source: https://finbold.com/arpa-brings-its-verifiable-random-number-generator-to-carv-and-sonic-svm/

data.title: Binance research: Record US Treasury supply will affect crypto markets in 2025
data.description:
A record issuance of $31T in US Treasury debt is expected in 2021, potentially increasing yields and shifting attention away from the crypto market.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/us-treasury-supply-will-affect-crypto-2025/

data.title: Binance Accelerates Funding Settlements to Tame Market Volatility
data.description:
TL;DR Binance shortened the funding rate settlement frequency from eight to two hours for selected perpetual contracts. It will also launch the EPTUSDT contract on April 21, with leverage of up to 20x and funding rates settled every four hours. Both measures reflect a comprehensive strategy to adjust risk parameters and reinforce operational stability in. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/binance-accelerates-funding-settlements-to-tame-market-volatility/

data.title: Analysis: BTC's rise from $70,000 to $110,000 lacks retail participation, and the trend may be similar to that at the end of 2021
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to @ali_charts analysis, the top of the BTC market has always been closely related to a surge in retail investor activity. However, during this round of Bitcoin's rise from $70,000 to $110,000, there were no obvious signs of retail investors entering the market, and the structure was similar to the market at the end of 2021.

data.title: Trump Considers Options Regarding Federal Reserve Chair
data.description: According to BlockBeats, U.S. President Donald Trump is exploring the possibility of removing Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell. This information was disclosed by Kevin Hassett, the Director of the National Economic Council, during a conversation with reporters. The potential move comes amid ongoing discussions about the Federal Reserve's policies and their impact on the U.S. economy.

data.title: Michael Saylor's firm has an outsized return since its Bitcoin romance in 2020
data.description:
Michael Saylor's Strategy offered a return of more than 2,400% since its aggressive acquisition of Bitcoin in August 2020.
source: https://www.thestreet.com/crypto/markets/michael-saylors-firm-has-an-outsized-return-since-its-bitcoin-romance-in-2020

data.description:

data.title: Astar Network Adjusts Tokenomics, Cuts Staking Rewards to Control Inflation
data.description:
TL;DR The drop of ASTR to $0. 02 on April 7 led Astar to cut base staking rewards from 25% to 10% to stabilize APR. Astar raised the variable portion of staking rewards for dApps from 40% to 55%, ties issuance to TVL, and does not affect developers. It set a minimum issuance floor of 2. 5%, maintains. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/astar-network-adjusts-tokenomics-cuts-staking-rewards-to-control-inflation/
